name: tink-chc-adyen-demo-contract
description: Required elements on the customer-hosted Tink consent screen (Pay by bank) plus the end-to-end checkout journey, for the Adyen CHC trial demo. One source of truth shared by humans and automated monitors.

navigateToConsent.note: Select 'Pay by bank' to reveal the bank picker.
Pick a bank — this reveals the customer-hosted consent block inline on the bol.com checkout.

checks.expectedPhrase: uses Tink to initiate your payment
checks.note: Must name Tink as provider/entity requesting consent, state the purpose (payment initiation), and request acceptance/acknowledgement of Tink's terms.
Link to Tink End-User Terms of Service.
'Learn how your data is used' page link.

_note_amounts: Amount, beneficiary, payment reference and source account are NOT asserted on the consent block — they are shown in the bol.com checkout context (Overzicht sidebar) rather than restated explicitly in the consent disclosure.

journey.description: Full happy path: pick Pay by bank -> bank -> consent -> accept -> QR + phone approval -> order confirmation. action 'click' clicks a selector; 'expect' waits for it to appear.

steps.note: Inline customer-hosted consent shown on the checkout
Accept consent and pay (the bol.com Betalen button)
Simulate scanning the QR on the phone
Redirected back to the merchant confirmation

mobile.description: Mobile checkout (mobile.html). Same consent contract (checks above); navigation differs — the method picker is a bottom sheet and the bank hand-off is app-to-app (no QR).

navigateToConsent.note: Pick a bank — reveals the inline consent.

steps.note: Betalen → redirect to the bank app

brokenVariants.note: Both demos accept ?broken=<data-test> to remove a required element, so the monitor can be shown catching a non-compliant screen.
